name: io.paas.build/mcp
description: Payments for AI builders. Identify a business, go live (sandbox + production), and mint checkout tokens — no UI. You stay the merchant; your users get paid too. 3.9%.

environmentVariables.name: PAAS_PROXY
environmentVariables.description: paas.build API base (secrets live server-side). Default https://api.paas.build

tools.name: identify_business
tools.description: Identify a business from a name/website/phrase using web search.

tools.name: go_live
tools.description: Create a live payment vendor (sandbox + production) and return access tokens.

tools.name: create_checkout
tools.description: Create a hosted checkout session and return a payable link.
